boundary_binding.action_boundary: May facilities allow contractor site work to begin?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No exact match; pending endorsement and insurance status verification block closure.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: STD-IRI-089-P requires endorsement authority match plus insurance-status class.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: CE-12 pending and insurance-status verification remain open.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Authority requires status class verified before 2026-06-28 start.

final_answer: Action may not proceed. Source records show END-IRI-089 endorsement pending CE-12 and WARN-IRI-089 requires separate insurance-status verification. STD-IRI-089-P demands full authority match on contractor, site, coverage, date, and status class before start. Boundary remains open; escalate for resolution.
